title: Belle and Sebastian: 30th Anniversary Tour
notes: Night 2 of 2-night 30th anniversary run (Night 1 = Tigermilk, Night 2 = If You're Feeling Sinister played in full).
full_description: Next year marks a big milestone for the band — 30 years of Tigermilk and If You're Feeling Sinister! To celebrate, Belle and Sebastian will play both albums in full across special two-night stands in the UK, Europe, the US, Canada and Mexico — each night dedicated to one of the records, followed by a set of classic songs spanning their career. We can't wait to bring these shows out to you!
ai_summary: Belle and Sebastian's 30th anniversary celebration — performing Tigermilk and If You're Feeling Sinister in full on consecutive nights, followed by a career-spanning set. The Glasgow band's most intimate large-venue tour in a decade, honouring the two records that defined indie pop.

setlist: Judy and the Dream of Horses
Get Me Away from Here I'm Dying
I Want the World to Stop
The Boy With the Arab Strap
